title: A Physiology-Based Approach to the Respiratory Care of Children With Severe BPD
authors: Leif D. Nelin, Steven H. Abman & Howard B. Panitch

blocks.text:
ทำไม neonatologist ต้องเข้าใจ Physiology-Based Approach สำหรับ Severe BPD?
(1) BPD ยังพบบ่อยมาก: 43% ของ preterm <29 weeks มี BPD; sBPD 16–30% ของ ELBW — ~13,000 รายต่อปีในสหรัฐฯ. (2) sBPD ≠ RDS: physiology ต่างกันสิ้นเชิง — sBPD มี regional heterogeneity + ↑ resistance + ↑ time constant → ventilator strategy ต้องกลับทิศ จาก early RDS (low TV → high TV; high rate → slow rate). (3) Pulmonary hypertension (PH): persistent PH → ↑ 40% mortality ใน BPD — ต้องรู้ SpO₂ target + sildenafil dose + เมื่อไหร่ต้องทำ cardiac catheterization. (4) Multidisciplinary chronic care model: sBPD ไม่ใช่ acute disease — recovery ใช้ months to years; ต้องการทีม neonatologist + pulmonologist + nutritionist + developmental therapist. (5) Tracheostomy timing: ยังเป็น controversial แต่ evidence แสดงว่า earlier (ก่อน 120 วัน) → better neurodevelopmental outcomes ใน vent-dependent infants.
เป้าหมายการเรียนรู้วันนี้
อธิบาย NIH 2001 definition ของ BPD + sBPD + type 2 sBPD — เกณฑ์ severity, limitation ของ definition
รู้ epidemiology ของ sBPD: incidence, มี BPD กี่รายต่อปีสหรัฐฯ, อะไรทำให้ persistent rate แม้ survival ดีขึ้น
อธิบาย pathogenesis ของ sBPD: antenatal + postnatal factors, volutrauma mechanism, why new BPD ≠ old BPD
อธิบาย lung mechanics ใน sBPD: ↑ resistance, ↑ time constant, heterogeneity, two-compartment model, gas trapping
อธิบาย cardiovascular complications: PH mechanism, PVS, LV diastolic dysfunction, systemic-to-pulmonary collaterals
เปรียบเทียบ ventilator strategy ใน early RDS vs established sBPD — เหตุผล physiology-based สำหรับ TV, IT, rate, PEEP
ระบุ SpO₂ target ที่ถูกต้องสำหรับ sBPD (ต่างจาก early preterm) + เหตุผลเรื่อง PH
อธิบาย indications + timing ของ tracheostomy ใน sBPD + ข้อดีต่อ neurodevelopment
รู้ drug therapies: diuretics (furosemide dose + mechanism), bronchodilators (limitation), steroids (ใช้เมื่อไหร่)
อธิบาย PH management algorithm: SpO₂ → iNO → sildenafil (dose titration) → bosentan/prostacyclin + เมื่อไหร่ทำ cardiac cath
อธิบาย interdisciplinary care: nutrition goals, neurodevelopmental care, family-centered approach
สรุป long-term outcomes ของ sBPD: persistent HRCT + lung function abnormalities ถึงวัยผู้ใหญ่
1. Definitions and Scope of Severe BPD

BPD ถูก characterize ครั้งแรกโดย Northway et al. 1967 ใน preterm 32–34 weeks — ปัจจุบัน survival ของ GA 28 สัปดาห์ = 94%, viability ขยายถึง 22–23 สัปดาห์ → persistent BPD rate 43% ใน <29 สัปดาห์ (Stoll JAMA 2015). sBPD เป็น most common morbidity of preterm birth: ~10,000–15,000 รายต่อปีในสหรัฐฯ (Abman J Pediatr 2017).
1.1 NIH 2001 BPD Classification (Jobe & Bancalari 2001)

Definition: chronic respiratory signs + persistent O₂ requirement + abnormal CXR ที่ 36 weeks PMA (born <32 weeks) หรือ 1 month of age (born ≥32 weeks). Severity graded by respiratory support needed at 36 weeks PMA: Mild = room air; Moderate = FiO₂ <0.30; Severe (sBPD) = FiO₂ ≥0.30 ± PPV/CPAP

Limitation ของ definition: ขาด specificity; ไม่ account for extreme prematurity; early respiratory deaths <36 wks PMA ไม่ถูก capture ทั้งที่อาจเป็น most severe BPD. ต้องการ biomarkers + physiologic markers ที่ดีกว่า O₂ dependency

Type 2 sBPD (ventilator-dependent BPD): sustained mechanical ventilation at 36 wks PMA — 41% ของ sBPD (BPD Collaborative). Highest morbidity + mortality: mortality ↑ กับ duration ของ mechanical ventilation (Walsh J Pediatr 2005)
1.2 Incidence Data
Original NIH validation study: 16% ของ <32 weeks, BW <1000 g มี sBPD (Ehrenkranz Pediatrics 2005). Scandinavia cohort: 20–25% ใน ≤28 weeks (EXPRESS 2010, Farstad Acta Paediatr 2011)
CHNC 2013 (Children's Hospital Neonatal Consortium): 16% incidence sBPD <32 wks; 91% survived to discharge; 66% discharged on O₂, 4% still on MV, 5% had tracheostomy (Padula J Perinatol 2013)
BPD Collaborative: point prevalence sBPD = 37% (range 11–58% across centers — huge center variability!). Of those: 41% type 2 sBPD (vent-dependent at 36 wks PMA) (Guaman Am J Perinatol 2015)

PROP study: 724 infants <29 weeks; sBPD incidence = 30.6%; 37% had persistent respiratory disease at 1 year (Keller J Pediatr 2017). Home ventilator: ~2000 sBPD children ใน US dependent on home MV (Boroughs Home Healthc Nurse 2012)

New BPD vs Old BPD — Key Differences
Old BPD (pre-surfactant era): fibroproliferative changes, prominent scarring, 32–34 wk GA, needed high O₂ + high vent support. New BPD: alveolar simplification + vascular growth arrest — milder uniform injury; ↓ alveolar number + ↓ vascular surface area; may develop with minimal/no vent support and low O₂. Pathology = disrupted antenatal + postnatal lung growth. HRCT: fine infiltrates + mild hyperlucency (not classic BPD pattern). Bottom line: 'the new BPD' คือ growth arrest ไม่ใช่ scarring
2. Pathogenesis of Severe BPD

BPD มี multifactorial etiology ตาม Northway 1967: hyperoxia + ventilator-induced lung injury + inflammation + infection. ทุก mechanism เพิ่ม oxidative stress → augments inflammation → impairs growth factor signaling → lung injury (Delaney Pediatr Res 2015, Salaets PLoS One 2015).
2.1 Antenatal Factors
Maternal smoking: Morrow Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2017 (n=587 preterm <34 wks): ↑ BPD risk 2-fold + ↑ prolonged MV. Preexisting maternal hypertension → ↑ odds BPD 2-fold

Chorioamnionitis: Lee J Perinatol 2011: ↑ BPD ใน ELBW. Preeclampsia: Hansen J Pediatr 2010: preeclampsia predicts BPD development. Intrauterine growth restriction: Bose Pediatrics 2009: IUGR <28 wks → ↑ chronic lung disease. IUGR + fetal programming alters lung development — independent of postnatal injury
2.2 Postnatal Factors — Mechanical Ventilation

Volutrauma คือ major mechanism: phasic stretch/overdistension → lung inflammation + permeability edema + structural changes mimicking BPD แม้ without high O₂ (Hillman Am J Physiol Lung 2011, Deptula Am J Physiol Lung 2016). High TV ต้องหลีกเลี่ยงทั้ง NICU + delivery room (Keszler Clin Perinatol 2015)
Hypocarbia + BPD: inverse relationship ระหว่าง low PaCO₂ + BPD (Garland Arch Pediatr 1995) — aggressive ventilation with hypocarbia → ↑ BPD risk → rationale สำหรับ permissive hypercapnia strategy

Failed FRC recruitment: small TV ลด volutrauma แต่ failure to maintain adequate FRC → injurious (Tingay Am J Physiol Lung 2015). Volume-targeted ventilation: Peng Arch Dis Child 2014 + Wheeler Cochrane 2010 → ↓ duration MV + ↓ BPD significantly vs pressure-limited
CPAP vs intubation: SUPPORT trial (Finer N Engl J Med 2010): early CPAP without intubation → ↓ need intubation, ↓ postnatal steroids for BPD, ↓ days MV. Centers using less MV → lower BPD incidence.
3. Pathophysiology of Severe BPD — Lung Mechanics

sBPD เป็นโรคที่ lung structure + function ผิดปกติหลายอย่างพร้อมกัน. Balinotti Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2009: ↓ lung surface area ใน BPD by diffusion capacity measurements. sBPD primary characterized by reduced surface area + heterogeneous lung units → regional variation ใน airway resistance + tissue compliance → highly variable time constants throughout the lung (Jarriel Pediatr Pulmonol 1993: two-compartment model).
3.1 Airways + Mechanics
Clinical signs ของ sBPD: tachypnea + shallow breathing + retractions + paradoxical breathing. ↑ RR → ↑ dead-space ventilation. Nonuniform damage → variable time constants → worsened V̇/Q̇ mismatch

Airway smooth muscle hypertrophy: Sward-Comunelli J Pediatr 1997: within first month ใน BPD infants. ↑ smooth muscle + thickened airway walls + fewer alveolar wall attachments → ↑ airway resistance demonstrable in first week in at-risk preterms (Goldman J Pediatr 1983)

Tracheobronchomalacia: airflow limitation ที่ worsened by bronchodilator therapy — crucial สำหรับ clinician รู้ก่อนให้ bronchodilator! Hysinger Ann Am Thorac Soc 2017: TBM associated with ↑ morbidity in BPD

Time constant progression: Baraldi Am J Respir Crit Care Med 1997 (n=24 BPD): time constant ↑ จาก 0.14±0.01 s (10–20 days) → 0.33 s (6 months) → 0.48 s (1 year) → 0.50 s (2 years) — ↑ progressively แม้ lung growing. Clinical implication: vent strategy ต้อง adapt ตาม age
3.2 Lung Volumes

FRC measurement paradox: gas dilution/N₂ washout → ↓ FRC ใน BPD (Baraldi 1997, Gerhardt J Pediatr 1987) แต่ body plethysmography → normal or elevated FRC (Robin Pediatr Pulmonol 2004). Explanation: gas dilution ไม่วัด trapped gas behind closed airways — difference between 2 methods = amount of gas trapping

RV + RV/TLC ratio: Robin 2004 (n=28 new BPD): ↑ RV + ↑ RV/TLC significantly vs normal while TLC normal range. Air trapping persists over time: TLC ↑ over 2nd year of life but RV/TLC unchanged → obstructive disease with persistent gas trapping. sBPD = predominantly OBSTRUCTIVE (not restrictive)
3.3 Forced Flows

V̇maxFRC ลด ~50% vs normal infants: (Hofhuis Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2002) — consistent finding ใน multiple studies. Longitudinal: rate of increase ใน BPD substantially below normal infants → fall further below normal at follow-up (Thunqvist Pediatr Pulmonol 2015)

Severity marker: toddlers BPD still on O₂ at 2 years → significantly lower volume-corrected forced flows (V̇maxFRC/FRC) vs BPD toddlers weaned from O₂. V̇maxFRC เป็น objective severity measure — predict long-term outcome

Lung Imaging ใน sBPD — What to Order and Why
CXR: often underestimates severity; correlates poorly with pathologic changes (Oppermann Pediatr Radiol 1977). HRCT (High-resolution CT): more sensitive — correlates with lung function + clinical severity (Mahut Arch Dis Child 2007). Useful for identifying unsuspected lesions. Radiation concern: CT radiation > CXR substantially — but novel algorithms (de Jong Pediatr Radiol 2006) ↓ dose to near-CXR levels for CF; similar development ongoing for BPD. Clinical pearl: HRCT findings improve over time with ventilator support + lung growth — serial HRCT demonstrates improvement despite persistent abnormality at 23 months (Fig. 22.2 from textbook).
4. Cardiovascular System in Severe BPD

Acute lung injury impairs growth + structure + function ของ developing pulmonary circulation after preterm birth. Endothelial cells susceptible to oxidant injury. Media ของ small pulmonary arteries: smooth muscle cell proliferation, precocious maturation ของ pericytes → mature smooth muscle cells — → ↑ pulmonary vascular resistance (PVR). Abnormal vasoreactivity → marked vasoconstriction in response to even mild hypoxia (Parker Semin Neonatol 2003).
4.1 Pulmonary Hypertension (PH)

PH + mortality: persistent echo evidence ของ PH beyond first few months → up to 40% mortality ใน BPD (Khemani Pediatrics 2007). High mortality ใน BPD + severe PH + prolonged vent support (Parker 2003)

Hypoxia-vasoconstriction link: cardiac catheterization studies: mild hypoxia → marked ↑ PA pressure แม้ basal PH moderate. Maintaining SpO₂ ≥92–94% effectively lowers PA pressure — นี่คือ rationale หลักสำหรับ SpO₂ target สูงกว่า early preterm

Vascular hypothesis (Abman Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2001): early injury → ↓ angiogenesis → ↓ alveolarization — impaired vascular growth + structural simplification (Jakkula Am J Physiol Lung 2000: inhibiting angiogenesis ↓ alveolarization ใน rat). Abnormal lung circulation ≠ just PH — broader pulmonary vascular disease
4.2 Pulmonary Vein Stenosis (PVS) — Emerging Entity

PVS: Mahgoub Pediatr Pulmonol 2017: 39 former preterms (median GA 28 wks, BW 1100 g); 74% มี BPD. Freedom from death or restenosis: 73% at 1 year, 55% at 2 years. Swier Am J Perinatol 2016 (n=213 sBPD): 5% มี PVS; survival 50% vs 86% ใน sBPD-PH without PVS — catastrophically worse outcomes
Clinical implication: ถ้า PVS เป็น cause ของ PH → vasodilators อาจ worsen หรือ no effect — นี่คือเหตุผลที่ต้องทำ cardiac catheterization ก่อน chronic vasodilator therapy. PVS ≠ typical PH mechanism
4.3 Other Cardiovascular Complications

Left ventricular hypertrophy (LVH): sBPD สามารถมี LVH โดยไม่มี RVH. LV diastolic dysfunction: Mourani J Pediatr 2008: → lung edema + diuretic dependency + PH ใน some BPD infants — อาจ explain persistent diuretic need

Systemic hypertension: mild to striking; usually responds to medication (Abman J Pediatr 1984). Systemic-to-pulmonary collateral vessels: large collaterals → significant shunting → edema + ↑ O₂ requirement. Some improved after embolization (↓ O₂ requirement + ↓ diuretics) — unusual but important
Atrial septal defects: commonly complicate sBPD course — variable contribution to disease severity. ASD + left-to-right shunt → ↑ pulmonary blood flow → ↑ edema → ↑ O₂ requirement
5. Evaluation and Treatment — General Framework

Important principle: recovery from sBPD is slow — months to years, not days to weeks. ต้องใช้ chronic care model ที่ต่างกันโดยสิ้นเชิงจาก acute care model ใน NICU. Patience is required — อย่า force wean หรือ extubate โดยไม่พร้อม.
5.1 Oxygen Therapy + SpO₂ Target

SpO₂ target ใน established sBPD: ≥94% (ต่างจาก early preterm 91–95%) — เหตุผล: (1) past retinopathy risk (ROP) ใน >36 wks PMA ลดลงมาก; (2) SpO₂ <92–94% → ↑ PA pressure via hypoxic vasoconstriction; (3) ↓ lability + cyanotic spells; (4) enhance growth
Monitoring: prolonged SpO₂ monitoring ขณะ awake, asleep, and during feedings — feeding = ↑ O₂ demand + ↑ work of breathing → หลุดง่าย. nCPAP/HFNC ใช้บ่อยเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยง reintubation
5.2 Mechanical Ventilation ใน Established sBPD — กลับทิศจาก RDS

Rationale: sBPD มี marked heterogeneity — regional variation in time constants (TC = R × C). Small TV + short IT → preferential gas distribution to fast (low R) compartments → dead-space ventilation + atelectasis slow compartments. ↑ TV + ↑ IT → improve distribution → ↓ dead-space → ↓ PCO₂ → ↓ FiO₂ (Fig. 22.3 textbook).

PEEP considerations ใน sBPD: (1) Higher PEEP ลด central airway closure ใน tracheomalacia/bronchomalacia (Davis Am J Respir Crit Care Med 1998, Panitch Am J Respir Crit Care Med 1994); (2) แต่ high PEEP complicates gas trapping — ต้องมี sufficient expiratory time; (3) Intrinsic PEEP: increase set PEEP to ≥80% of intrinsic PEEP → improve patient-ventilator synchrony

Dynamic hyperinflation: ผลร้าย: flat P-V loop → large pressure change = small TV change; ↑ PVR (alveolar vessel compression); ↓ V̇/Q̇. Solution: slower rate + ↑ expiratory time to allow complete lung emptying
5.3 Tracheostomy — When and Why?
Indications: signs of severe respiratory distress ที่ persist แม้ nCPAP/HFNC: dyspnea, head-bobbing, retractions, tachypnea, intermittent cyanosis, CO₂ retention + failed repeated extubation attempts

Benefits: stable airway → more effective ventilation → ↓ respiratory distress → ↓ O₂ requirement + ↓ PH. ↑ respiratory stability → ↑ tolerance of therapies + family interaction → ↑ neurodevelopmental outcomes

Timing evidence: DeMauro J Pediatr 2014 (NRN database, n=304): tracheostomy before 120 days → ↓ death or NDI vs after 120 days. Adult ICU: early trach ≤10 days → ↓ mortality + ↑ discharge (Andriolo Cochrane 2015). Median age at trach in sBPD = 46 weeks PMA (range 43–52 wks) (Murthy J Perinatol 2017)

Suggestion (Abman J Pediatr 2017): if born <28 wks and still on continuous MV at 40 weeks → begin tracheostomy discussion with parents. Important: tracheostomy alone ≠ sufficient — interdisciplinary team + optimized ventilator management essential
5.4 Gastroesophageal Reflux (GER) ใน sBPD

Evaluation: barium swallow + upper GI series + pH/impedance probe + swallow study. GER + chronic aspiration → ongoing lung injury. Jadcherla Am J Gastroenterol 2008: GER causes symptoms แม้ refluxate ไม่ถึง pharynx; likelihood ∝ clearance time ของ acid refluxate
Treatment: consider gastrostomy with fundoplication ใน sBPD that is failing to improve + high GER suspicion even with negative studies — high morbidity/mortality ใน sBPD justifies proactive approach
6. Drug Therapies
6.1 Diuretics

Furosemide: ↓ pulmonary edema → ↑ lung compliance + ↓ airway resistance. Dose: 1 mg/kg q12h IV หรือ 2 mg/kg q12h PO. Mechanism beyond diuresis: ↑ prostaglandin from renal/vascular endothelium → vasodilation → fluid shift alveoli→venous (Cotton Acta Paediatr 2012). McCann J Pediatr 1985: furosemide → ↑ weaning from vent vs placebo

Alternate-day furosemide: Rush J Pediatr 1990: sustains lung function improvements while ↓ risk of electrolyte imbalance + nephrocalcinosis. Aerosolized furosemide: acutely ↑ mechanics แต่ chronic benefit lacking. Thiazides + spironolactone: ↑ lung function inconsistently (Kao Pediatrics 1984)

Limitation: diuretics → short-term ↑ compliance but little evidence ลด vent duration/LOS/long-term outcomes. Chronic diuretic dependency อาจ reflect LV diastolic dysfunction (Mourani 2008) rather than direct lung edema
6.2 Bronchodilators

Indication: BPD มี airway smooth muscle hypertrophy + bronchial hyperreactivity → acute improvement with bronchodilators แต่ response variable. Clouse PLoS One 2016 systematic review: ไม่มี long-term benefit สำหรับ prevention/treatment BPD

Methylxanthines (aminophylline, caffeine): ↓ airway resistance + additive effect กับ diuretics; ↑ weaning from MV (Henderson-Smart Cochrane 2003). Side effects: jitteriness, seizures, GER. CAUTION: bronchodilator worsens flow limitation ใน tracheomalacia — identify TBM ก่อนให้ routinely
6.3 Corticosteroids

Early systemic steroids: discouraged by AAP (Watterberg Pediatrics 2010) — adverse effects on neurodevelopment. Exception: steroid bursts (prednisone 1–2 mg/kg/day × 3–5 days) for acute deterioration in sBPD — short course, not prophylactic

Inhaled steroids: inconsistent benefit (Shah Cochrane 2012). 2 small studies: ↑ successful extubation + ↓ systemic steroids (Cole N Engl J Med 1999, Jonsson Acta Paediatr 2000). Fluticasone: ↑ systolic BP as adverse effect (Dugas Pediatrics 2005). Older BPD survivors with recurrent wheeze: ไม่มี elevated eosinophilic markers หรือ mast cell bronchospasm → role ของ ICS less certain
7. Treatment of Pulmonary Hypertension in sBPD

Recommendations: Krishnan J Pediatr 2017 guidelines. Initial step: treat underlying lung disease — reflux/aspiration, structural airway abnormalities (tonsillar/adenoidal hypertrophy, VCP, subglottic stenosis, TBM), bronchial reactivity, edema. Sleep study อาจจำเป็น เพื่อ characterize hypoxemia (obstructive vs central vs mixed). Bronchoscopy สำหรับ anatomic + dynamic airway lesions.

PH Management Algorithm in sBPD (Box 22.2 from textbook)
STEP 1 — SCREEN: Echo q1–2 months ถ้า no PH จนกว่า respiratory status ↑ significantly. Markers: septal flattening, TR jet velocity, cor pulmonale.
STEP 2 — IF PH PRESENT: optimize respiratory support, avoid hypoxemia → start iNO 20 ppm (short-term).
STEP 3 — TRANSITION TO SILDENAFIL: start 0.5 mg/kg q8h → advance ปรับขึ้นทีละน้อยใน 2 สัปดาห์ → max 2 mg/kg q6–8h (ถ้าไม่มี systemic hypotension). Wean iNO ขณะ sildenafil ↑.
STEP 4 — REFRACTORY PH: continue iNO + sildenafil หรือ consider ETRA (bosentan) หรือ prostacyclin analog.
STEP 5 — CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION: ก่อน chronic vasodilator therapy เพื่อ evaluate: PA hemodynamics, LV function, PVS, aortopulmonary collaterals, vasodilator challenge response. MANDATORY ถ้าสงสัย PVS (vasodilators อาจ worsen PVS-related PH).

Sildenafil evidence: Mourani J Pediatr 2009 (n=25, 18 มี BPD): prolonged sildenafil → ↑ PH by echo ใน 88% without significant adverse events. Many weaned from MV + iNO during sildenafil treatment. Most studied drug ใน BPD-PH

Calcium channel blockers (CCBs — nifedipine): benefit some patients; short-term effects reported. แต่ Mourani Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2004: acute CCB response poor vs iNO + systemic hypotension in some → CCBs = second-line only
8. Interdisciplinary Care + Nutrition + Neurodevelopment
8.1 Multidisciplinary Team

Team composition: neonatologist + pulmonologist + respiratory therapist + nutritionist + occupational therapist + speech therapist + physical therapist + social worker. Family-centered care เริ่มตั้งแต่ต้น — ↑ family comfort → ↑ discharge readiness → ↓ rehospitalization. Regular team meetings throughout NICU (ไม่ใช่แค่ตอน discharge)

Evidence: Shepherd J Perinatol 2012: interdisciplinary BPD program associated with ↑ neurodevelopmental outcomes + ↓ rehospitalizations. Gien Am J Perinatol 2017: interdisciplinary ventilator care program → ↑ survival in vent-dependent BPD
8.2 Nutrition

Goals: (1) Weight gain: 15–20 g/kg/day ที่ <37 wks PGA; 20–30 g/day ที่ ≥37 wks PGA; (2) Caloric needs: 120–150 kcal/kg/day (often fluid restricted → ต้องใช้ high-caloric density feeds); (3) Display growth chart at bedside daily
Mother's own breast milk (MOM): preferred even if needs heavy fortification — MOM + fortifier ยังดีกว่า formula ใน sBPD. Nutrition supports lung healing + repair (ไม่ใช่แค่ growth)
8.3 Neurodevelopmental Care
Outcomes: cerebral palsy: 11% mild BPD vs 27% severe BPD. Cognitive Bayley <70: 12% moderate BPD vs 15% severe BPD (Shepherd J Perinatol 2012 — Nationwide Children's).

Developmental therapy: 3–5×/week while hospitalized; age-appropriate sensory + social environment. Formal neurodevelopmental assessment at ~40 weeks PMA. Behavioral nursing care → ↓ cyanotic spells + agitation. Minimize noxious stimuli (arterial/heel sticks). Opioids + sedatives ใช้ with caution

Tracheostomy + neurodevelopment: patients on vent with ET tube → sedation frequently needed, developmental + oral skills hard to advance, restraints needed (DeMauro Semin Fetal Neonatal Med 2016). Tracheostomy → ↑ respiratory stability → ↑ interaction → ↑ neurodevelopment
9. Long-Term Outcomes

HRCT at 10–18 years: Aukland Thorax 2009 (n=86 survivors <1000 g or ≤28 wks): significantly higher HRCT scores + more opacities + hypoattenuated areas ใน moderate/severe BPD history vs no/mild BPD. Structural changes persist

Emphysematous changes ในผู้ใหญ่: Wong Eur Respir J 2008 (n=19, age 17–33 years, BW <1500 g, BPD moderate-severe 1980–1987): abnormal HRCT with emphysematous changes + correlated with pulmonary function abnormalities. Islam Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2015: sBPD associated with lifelong changes in pulmonary structure + function

Exercise intolerance: BPD adolescents/young adults — persistent lung function abnormalities even when asymptomatic. Doyle N Engl J Med 2017: ventilation in extremely preterm infants → abnormal respiratory function at 8 years. Long-term follow-up เป็น key component ของ BPD care
10. NICU Practical — Bedside Application
10.1 Ventilator Troubleshooting ใน sBPD
PCO₂ สูงแม้ rate เพิ่ม: ตรวจสอบ TV จริง — อาจ ↓ เพราะ tachypnea + short exp time → gas trapping + auto-PEEP. Solution: ↓ rate + ↑ TV + ↑ exp time ไม่ใช่เพิ่ม rate อีก
SpO₂ fluctuate มาก: consider TBM (dynamic airway collapse) — bronchoscopy อาจจำเป็น. ↑ PEEP ทดลอง → ถ้า SpO₂ stabilizes → TBM likely
Agitation + ↑ work of breathing แม้ vent support: consider overdistension — overdistention → agitation → ↑ WOB paradoxically (↑ PVR + ↓ compliance at high lung volume). ↓ TV หรือ ↓ PEEP ทดลอง
10.2 Echo Monitoring Protocol
Baseline echo at NICU admission sBPD: หา septal flattening + TR jet + RVH + LV function + ASD.
ถ้าไม่มี PH: repeat echo q1–2 months จนกว่า respiratory status ↑ significantly
ถ้ามี PH: follow PH management algorithm (Section 7). Strongly consider cardiac cath ก่อน chronic vasodilator — rule out PVS + left heart disease + collaterals
11. 5 Bedside Pearls

PEARL 1 — sBPD Vent Strategy = Opposite of RDS (Bigger TV, Slower Rate)
RDS: low TV 4–6 mL/kg + short IT + high rate. sBPD: 10–12 mL/kg + IT ≥0.6s + slow rate. Physiologic reason: sBPD มี heterogeneous time constants — small TV preferentially ventilates fast (low resistance) compartments → dead-space ventilation + atelectasis slow compartments. ↑ TV + ↑ IT → better distribution → ↓ PCO₂ + ↓ FiO₂. PEEP ต้องสูงพอสำหรับ TBM แต่อย่าให้มาก จนเกิด gas trapping — ให้ expiratory time เพียงพอ. ถ้า intrinsic PEEP → set PEEP ≥80% of intrinsic PEEP.

PEARL 2 — SpO₂ Target ใน sBPD = ≥94% (ไม่ใช่ 88–92%)
ทำไม target สูงกว่า: sBPD patients มักเกิน 36 wks PMA → ROP risk ↓. แต่ mild hypoxia → marked ↑ PA pressure via pulmonary vasoconstriction — cardiac cath studies confirmed. SpO₂ ≥92–94% ↓ PA pressure effectively. SpO₂ <92% → ↑ PVR → ↑ RV afterload → ↑ PH → ↑ mortality. Clinical error ที่พบบ่อย: ใช้ target 88–92% จาก early preterm management ใน sBPD that is already >36 wks — need to upgrade target once established sBPD confirmed.

PEARL 3 — Bronchodilator อาจ Worsen BPD ถ้ามี Tracheomalacia
Paradox: BPD มี smooth muscle hypertrophy → airway hyperreactivity → acute response to bronchodilators. แต่ ถ้ามี TBM (tracheobronchomalacia) → bronchodilator ↓ smooth muscle tone → ↓ airway wall support → ↑ airway collapse → worsened flow limitation (Panitch Pediatri Pulmonol 1990). ทำ bronchoscopy ก่อน routine bronchodilator ถ้ามี suspicion TBM — signs: SpO₂ lability, cyanotic spells, diffuse wheezes not responding or worsening with bronchodilator. ↑ PEEP ทดลอง: ถ้า ↑ PEEP → ↓ spells → TBM likely (PEEP stents airway open).

PEARL 4 — Tracheostomy = เครื่องมือ ไม่ใช่ความพ่ายแพ้
NICU providers มักมอง tracheostomy = poor outcome marker — แต่ evidence แสดงตรงกันข้าม: DeMauro J Pediatr 2014: tracheostomy ก่อน 120 วัน → ↓ death/NDI vs after 120 วัน. Tracheostomy → (1) stable airway + more effective ventilation + ↓ respiratory distress; (2) ↓ sedation need; (3) ↑ developmental therapy + oral skills + family interaction. Suggestion: ถ้า <28 wks ยังอยู่บน continuous MV ที่ 40 weeks → start discussion ทันที. Tracheostomy alone ≠ enough — ต้องมี interdisciplinary team + optimized ventilator management ด้วย.

PEARL 5 — PVS = Silent Killer ใน sBPD — ต้อง Rule Out ก่อน Vasodilator
Pulmonary vein stenosis (PVS): 5% ของ sBPD; survival 50% vs 86% ใน PH without PVS — dramatically worse outcome. Vasodilators ใน PVS: little effect หรือ worsen clinical status — because PVS blocks outflow → ↑ postcapillary pressure → vasodilators ↑ pulmonary blood flow into stenotic veins → ↑ pulmonary edema. Cardiac catheterization ก่อน chronic vasodilator therapy เป็น mandatory ถ้า PH ไม่ respond ตามคาด. Echo อาจ miss PVS — cath = gold standard for evaluation PA hemodynamics + LV function + PVS + collaterals + vasodilator challenge.
12. Evidence Update — Landmark Studies
Northway WH et al. N Engl J Med 1967;276:357: First description of BPD — hyperoxia + MV in hyaline membrane disease; fibroproliferative changes; 60% mortality in 32–34 wk preterms. Founding paper.
Jobe AH & Bancalari E. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2001;163:1723 (NIH consensus): Current BPD definition by severity at 36 wks PMA: mild/moderate/severe. sBPD = FiO₂ ≥0.30 ± PPV/CPAP.
Stoll BJ et al. JAMA 2015;314:1039: NICHD trends 1993–2012: survival 28 wks = 94%; BPD persists at 43% <29 wks despite improved care. BPD incidence unchanged over decade.

Finer NN et al. N Engl J Med 2010;362:1970 (SUPPORT): Early CPAP without intubation vs surfactant + intubation in extreme preterm: ↓ intubation, ↓ postnatal steroids, ↓ MV days, ↑ alive + off MV by day 7.

Wheeler K et al. Cochrane 2010:CD003666 + Peng W et al. Arch Dis Child 2014;99:F158: Volume-targeted ventilation vs pressure-limited: ↓ BPD significantly + ↓ MV duration — meta-analysis confirming VG ventilation benefit.

Baraldi E et al. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 1997;155:149: Time constant in BPD: 0.14s at 10–20 days → 0.50s at 2 years (p<0.0001); compliance + resistance abnormalities persist and worsen — longitudinal physiologic characterization of sBPD.

Jarriel WS et al. Pediatr Pulmonol 1993;15:175: BPD lung mechanics better characterized by two-compartment model — heterogeneity of time constants; validates physiologic rationale for ↑ TV + ↑ IT ventilator strategy in sBPD.
Khemani E et al. Pediatrics 2007;120:1260: Persistent PH by echo beyond first few months of BPD → up to 40% mortality in surfactant era. High mortality in BPD + severe PH requiring prolonged vent.

Mourani PM et al. J Pediatr 2009;154:379 (Sildenafil): 25 infants with chronic lung disease + PH (18 BPD): sildenafil → ↑ PH by echo in 88%, weaned from MV/iNO, no significant adverse events. Most evidence for sildenafil in BPD-PH.
Mahgoub L et al. Pediatr Pulmonol 2017;52:1063 (PVS): 39 former preterms with PVS; 74% had BPD. Freedom from death/restenosis: 73% at 1 yr, 55% at 2 yr — devastating outcome worse than BPD-PH alone.

DeMauro SB et al. J Pediatr 2014;164:1303 (Tracheostomy timing): NRN database, 304 preterms with trach: trach before 120 days → ↓ death or NDI vs after 120 days — strongest evidence for earlier tracheostomy in sBPD.

Abman SH et al. J Pediatr 2017;181:12 (Interdisciplinary care): Framework for interdisciplinary care of sBPD: multidisciplinary team + family-centered chronic care + neurodevelopmental focus + standardized discharge → ↑ outcomes.

Aukland SM et al. Thorax 2009;64:405: 86 survivors extreme preterm at 10–18 years: moderate/severe BPD history → significantly higher HRCT scores + opacities + hypoattenuated areas vs no/mild BPD. Evidence for lifelong structural impact of sBPD.

Wong PM et al. Eur Respir J 2008;32:321: BW <1500 g, age 17–33 years, moderate-severe BPD: emphysematous HRCT changes + correlated pulmonary function abnormalities in young adults — sBPD as lifelong disease.
13. Self-Check Questions พร้อมเฉลย
Q: อธิบาย NIH 2001 BPD severity classification + definition ของ type 2 sBPD

ตอบ: NIH 2001 (Jobe & Bancalari): assessed ที่ 36 wks PMA (born <32 wks). Mild: room air. Moderate: FiO₂ <0.30. Severe (sBPD): FiO₂ ≥0.30 ± PPV/CPAP. Type 2 sBPD: sustained mechanical ventilation at 36 wks PMA — 41% of sBPD patients (BPD Collaborative). Limitations: early deaths <36 wks not captured; extreme prematurity context varies; need for supplemental O₂ at 1 mo in 24–25 wk may just be immaturity not injury.
Q: เพราะอะไร ventilator strategy ใน established sBPD จึงต้องกลับทิศจาก early RDS? อธิบาย physiology

ตอบ: RDS (early prevention): low TV 4–6 mL/kg + short IT + high rate → ↓ volutrauma. sBPD (treatment): ↑ TV 10–12 mL/kg + IT ≥0.6s + ↓ rate → เหตุผล: heterogeneous time constants (TC = R×C). sBPD มี regions ที่ different R + C → different TC. Small TV + short IT → gas goes only to fast (low TC) compartments → dead-space ventilation + atelectasis slow compartments. ↑ TV + ↑ IT → ↑ driving pressure into slow compartments → improved gas distribution → ↓ dead-space → ↓ PCO₂ → ↓ FiO₂. Slow rate → adequate expiratory time → prevent gas trapping + dynamic hyperinflation.
Q: SpO₂ target ใน established sBPD คือเท่าไหร่? ทำไมต่างจาก early preterm?

ตอบ: Target: SpO₂ ≥94% ใน established sBPD. ทำไม: (1) sBPD patients มักเกิน 36 wks PMA → ROP risk ลดลงมาก; (2) mild hypoxia → marked ↑ PA pressure via hypoxic pulmonary vasoconstriction — cardiac cath studies: even modest baseline PH → marked ↑ PA pressure with mild hypoxia; (3) SpO₂ ≥92–94% effectively lowers PA pressure (Parker 2003); (4) ↓ cyanotic spells + lability; (5) enhance growth. Early preterm (before established sBPD) = 91–95% acceptable — more concerned about oxygen toxicity/ROP at that stage.
Q: อธิบาย PVS ใน sBPD — ทำไมสำคัญ + ทำไม cardiac catheterization mandatory?

ตอบ: PVS (pulmonary vein stenosis): 5% ของ sBPD patients; Mahgoub 2017: 74% ของ PVS patients มี BPD. Survival: 50% vs 86% ใน sBPD-PH without PVS — dramatically worse. ทำไม vasodilators harmful in PVS: vasodilators → ↑ pulmonary blood flow แต่ stenotic pulmonary veins block outflow → ↑ postcapillary pressure → ↑ pulmonary edema + ↑ PA pressure paradoxically. Cardiac cath = gold standard: evaluate PA hemodynamics + LV function + PVS + aortopulmonary collaterals + vasodilator response. Echo alone may miss PVS. Must cath before chronic vasodilator therapy.
Q: อธิบาย rationale สำหรับ early tracheostomy ใน sBPD

ตอบ: Evidence: DeMauro J Pediatr 2014 (NRN, n=304): trach before 120 days → ↓ death/NDI vs after. Adult ICU: early trach ≤10 days → ↓ mortality + ↑ ICU discharge (Andriolo Cochrane 2015). Mechanisms of benefit: (1) stable airway → more effective ventilation + ↓ respiratory distress + ↓ O₂ + ↓ PH; (2) ↓ sedation; (3) ↑ developmental therapy + oral skills advancement; (4) ↑ family interaction → ↑ maternal-infant bonding. Suggestion: born <28 wks + still on continuous MV at 40 wks → begin discussion. Trach alone ≠ enough — interdisciplinary team essential.
Q: อธิบาย drug therapies ใน sBPD: furosemide dose + mechanism; bronchodilator limitation; steroid ใช้เมื่อไหร่

ตอบ: Furosemide: dose 1 mg/kg q12h IV หรือ 2 mg/kg q12h PO. Mechanism beyond diuresis: ↑ prostaglandin from renal/vascular endothelium → vasodilation → fluid alveoli→venous. Short-term ↑ compliance, little long-term LOS benefit. Alternate-day ↓ nephrocalcinosis. Bronchodilators: acute response variable; no long-term benefit (Clouse 2016). CAUTION: worsens airflow in TBM. Steroids: early systemic discouraged (AAP 2010 — NDI risk). Burst prednisone 1–2 mg/kg/day × 3–5 days acceptable สำหรับ acute deterioration in established sBPD. Inhaled steroids: ↑ extubation rate ใน 2 small studies (Cole 1999, Jonsson 2000) แต่ not routine.
Q: อธิบาย lung volume abnormalities ใน sBPD — ทำไม gas dilution FRC แตกต่างจาก plethysmography FRC?

ตอบ: Gas dilution/N₂ washout: วัดเฉพาะ gas ที่ communicates กับ conducting airways during tidal breathing → underestimates actual FRC เพราะไม่วัด trapped gas behind closed airways. Plethysmography: วัด all gas in thorax รวม trapped → often normal/elevated FRC ใน BPD. Difference between methods = gas trapping amount. Robin 2004: ↑ RV + ↑ RV/TLC vs normal แต่ TLC normal → obstructive pattern with gas trapping persisting over time. sBPD = primarily OBSTRUCTIVE (not restrictive) — ↑ resistance + gas trapping หลัก, ไม่ใช่ lung fibrosis อย่างเดียว.
Q: LV diastolic dysfunction ใน sBPD — อธิบาย mechanism + clinical implication

ตอบ: Mourani J Pediatr 2008: LV diastolic dysfunction ใน BPD → ↑ lung edema + diuretic dependency + PH ใน some infants. Mechanism: sBPD → systemic hypertension → LVH → impaired LV relaxation → ↑ LV filling pressures → pulmonary venous hypertension → edema. Clinical implication: (1) chronic diuretic dependency อาจ reflect LV diastolic dysfunction ไม่ใช่แค่ lung edema; (2) cardiac cath ตรวจ LV function เป็นส่วนหนึ่งของ PH evaluation; (3) vasodilators อาจ worsen ถ้า LV diastolic dysfunction เป็น cause ของ PH (postcapillary PH — different management).
Q: อธิบาย nutritional goals + neurodevelopmental care ใน sBPD

ตอบ: Nutrition: weight gain goal 15–20 g/kg/day (<37 wks PGA) / 20–30 g/day (≥37 wks PGA); caloric need 120–150 kcal/kg/day (fluid restricted → high-caloric density feeds); MOM preferred even with heavy fortification. Growth chart at bedside daily. Neurodevelopment: developmental therapy 3–5×/week; age-appropriate sensory + social environment; formal assessment at 40 wks PMA; minimize noxious stimuli; caution opioids/sedatives. Tracheostomy ↑ developmental opportunity: ↓ sedation + ↑ interaction + ↑ oral skill advancement vs prolonged ETT.
Q: สรุป long-term respiratory outcome ของ sBPD survivors ถึงวัยผู้ใหญ่

ตอบ: Adolescents: Aukland Thorax 2009: ↑ HRCT scores + opacities + hypoattenuated areas ใน moderate/severe BPD at 10–18 years. Young adults: Wong Eur Respir J 2008: emphysematous HRCT + pulmonary function abnormalities at age 17–33. Conclusion: sBPD → lifelong lung structural + functional abnormalities (Islam Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2015). Implication for practice: longitudinal follow-up เป็น essential part of sBPD care; counsel families ว่า respiratory disease may persist into adulthood; monitor with lung function testing + HRCT at follow-up. sBPD อาจ contribute to growing adult COPD population — needs further study.
Series Completion — Newborn Lung Series

ยินดีด้วย! คุณเรียน The Newborn Lung Series ครบแล้ว (NL Day 01–22)
คุณได้เรียน 22 chapters ของ The Newborn Lung, 3rd ed. (2019) ครบทุกบท — จาก molecular basis ของ lung development (Ch.1) ถึง physiology-based approach ของ severe BPD (Ch.22). สิ่งที่เรียนผ่านมาใน Series นี้:
NL 01–05: Lung development (molecular, perinatal events, vascular, omics, microbiome) | NL 06–09: BPD definitions, PDA, VAP, long-term outcomes | NL 10–13: CV support, noninvasive ventilation, surfactant strategies, respiratory control/apnea | NL 14–16: Oxygenation instability, optimal oxygenation, patient-vent interaction | NL 17–19: Pulmonary-CV interaction, ventilator strategies for lung injury, automation | NL 20–22: Prenatal/postnatal steroids, cell-based therapy for BPD, physiology-based care of severe BPD. 
Next steps: Daily Neonatology Lessons Series หรือ ทบทวน Avery / Fanaroff chapters ที่ยังไม่ได้เรียน.
